channel.title: 3 on DANIELLE COSME
channel.description: Recent content in 3 on DANIELLE COSME

item.title: Neural indicators of food cue reactivity, regulation, and valuation and their associations with body composition and daily eating behavior
item.description:
Citation:
Cosme, D., & Lopez, R. B. (Under Review) Neural indicators of food cue reactivity, regulation, and valuation and their associations with body composition and daily eating behavior.

item.title: If you’re happy and you know it: Neural correlates of self-evaluated psychological health and well-being
item.description:
Citation:
Cosme, D., Mobasser, A., Ross, G. & Pfeifer, J. H. (In Prep) If you’re happy and you know it: Neural correlates of self-evaluated psychological health and well-being.
